title: Seerr — Media Requests Available
summary: Seerr — Media Requests Available Seerr is now available via Hermes for requesting movies and TV shows! ## How it works - Ask Hermes to download a movie or show (e.g., "download Dune") - Hermes searches Seerr and shows you options with a picker - You pick what you want, and it gets requested to the *arr stack - Once downloaded, it becomes available in your media library ## Usage examples - "download Dune" - "download The Bear" - "can you get me the movie Interstellar?" ## What's available - Movies and TV shows via TMDB search - Season selection for TV shows - 4K request support

claims.text: Seerr — Media Requests Available Seerr is now available via Hermes for requesting movies and TV shows!

## How it works - Ask Hermes to download a movie or show (e.g., "download Dune") - Hermes searches Seerr and shows you options with a picker - You pick what you want, and it gets requested to the *arr stack - Once downloaded, it becomes available in your media library ## Usage examples - "download Dune" - "download The Bear" - "can you get me the movie Interstellar?" ## What's available - Movies and TV shows via TMDB search - Season selection for TV shows - 4K request support
